code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn iget(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or(text, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading and i < n
        let c = byte_or(text, i)
        if is_digit(c)
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, sign * val)
    end
  end

  mut uniq: List<Int> = []
  for x in nums
    if not list.contains(uniq, x)
      uniq = list.push(uniq, x)
    end
  end

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = uniq
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut min_val = iget(remaining, 0)
    mut min_idx = 0
    mut j = 1
    while j < remaining.len()
      let cur = iget(remaining, j)
      if cur < min_val
        min_val = cur
        min_idx = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
    mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
    mut k = 0
    while k < remaining.len()
      if k != min_idx
        new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, iget(remaining, k))
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    remaining = new_remaining
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in sorted
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
